pi_items.source: AirNav.com and FltPlan.com - FAA official VOR navaid identifier
AirNav.com: 37-43-33.332N / 122-13-24.931W. Decimal conversion: 122 + 13/60 + 24.931/3600 = 122.2236, negated for West = -122.2236, which rounds to -122.224
Verified in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts - consistent file path

privileged_info_summary: The OAK VOR/DME navaid in Oakland, California has an official frequency of 116.80 MHz and identifier OAK. Its precise location is 37-43-33.332N / 122-13-24.931W, which converts to decimal coordinates of 37.7259° N and -122.2236° W. The task metadata accurately captures the frequency (116.8 MHz) and identifier (OAK), and correctly states the latitude as 37.726°. The longitude value in metadata shows -122.223, which is a minor discrepancy from the properly rounded value of -122.224° (though this is only a 0.001 degree difference). The data used in this task is real, sourced from the FAA's official VOR navaid database through AirNav and FltPlan.
